final:
module ALU (
    input [15:0] obf_A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input [1:0] ctrl,
    output reg [15:0] result
);

always @(*) begin
    case (ctrl)
        2'b00: result = obf_A + B;            // Addition
        2'b01: result = obf_A - B;            // Subtraction
        2'b10: result = obf_A & B;            // Bitwise AND
        2'b11: result = obf_A | B;            // Bitwise OR
        default: result = 16'h0000;       // Default case (should not happen)
    endcase
end

endmodule
